capabilities: Integrate fuzz testing procedures with agent planning knowledge base to enhance security vulnerability discovery by aligning shared steps and merging workflows.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from fuzz testing and agent planning by applying domain-specific tooling; ensure all shared steps are aligned and log discrepancies to integration_log by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.
Execute fuzz testing scenarios using the merged knowledge base; assert that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true for each scenario executed.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code for each fuzz testing scenario to the audit trail for traceability and future analysis using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert the merged output by running domain-specific validation tools; assert that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true, logging any validation failures.
Filter candidate vulnerabilities by leveraging the integrated knowledge base; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true, logging all findings to vulnerability_log.

summary: Integrate fuzz testing for security vulnerabilities with agent planning knowledge base by merging workflows and aligning shared steps for enhanced security insights.
title: Fuzz Testing Workflow Integration

failureConditions: Inconsistent results when merging artifacts omits alignment of shared steps, causing incomplete vulnerability detection.
Increased error rates when validation tools are not properly configured, leading to false negatives in vulnerability detection.
Loss of traceability when operation logs are not consistently recorded, causing difficulties in auditing and analysis.
metrics: that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true for each scenario executed
the merged output by running domain-specific validation tools
that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true, logging any validation failures
all steps have corresponding log entries
successConditions: log completeness: assert all steps have corresponding log entries
